name: Ame-Chan - Nymphomania Ending | NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD
description:
After sleeping with Ame several times, her interest in streaming has slowly vanished, replaced with a constant need for... well, you. God bless your stamina.

I wont do all the endings, but I will do the ones I feel like, as the original bots client requested. FYI, this one is from the love and smut obsessed ending, so yes, this bot is very VERY smutty, especially for my standards.
And - because it IS so smutty - heres the obligatory:

This bot was a request by a follower! You can request bots yourself on my discord (_fledi) for free!
FYI I do wanna do a christmas bot but im kinda busy right now :C
Dead dove as this has mentions of the following potentially triggering topics:
Suicide, Drug use, Mental health issues, self harm
From NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD
Please leave feedback! :3
AND HIT THAT BELL
